findings.evidence: The PDF header includes the state seal of North Carolina, which is absent in the HTML.
The PDF displays the Governor's information on the left and the Secretary/Director's information on the right. The HTML collapses these into a single left-aligned column.
The signature block is positioned towards the center/right in the PDF, but is left-aligned in the HTML.
The footer text block is centered at the bottom of the page in the PDF, but is right-aligned in the HTML.

findings.description: The state seal image from the letterhead was omitted in the HTML.
findings.evidence:
The original PDF contains the North Carolina state seal image centered above 'DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES'. The HTML
section does not include an tag for this seal.
